title: “Free him”: Twitch streamer BruceDropEmOff backs Karmelo Anthony and sparks fierce debate over Austin Metcalf murder conviction
summary_full: Streamer and YouTuber BruceDropEmOff publicly supported Karmelo Anthony after the teenager was convicted of murdering Austin Metcalf and sentenced to 35 years in prison. Bruce’s “#FREEHIM” message sparked debate online. Supporters viewed it as standing with Anthony, while critics argued it ignored the jury’s decision. The case continues to fuel discussions about race, justice, accountability, and self-defense.
summary_public: Streamer and YouTuber BruceDropEmOff publicly supported Karmelo Anthony after the teenager was convicted of murdering Austin Metcalf and sentenced to 35 years in prison. Bruce’s “#FREEHIM” message sparked debate online.…
